/usr/bin/ar qc libproject4.a CMakeFiles/project4.dir/src/rix/robot/joint.cpp.o CMakeFiles/project4.dir/src/rix/robot/link.cpp.o CMakeFiles/project4.dir/src/rix/robot/robot_model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/project4.dir/src/rix/robot/eigen_util.cpp.o CMakeFiles/project4.dir/src/rix/tf/frame_graph.cpp.o CMakeFiles/project4.dir/src/rix/tf/frame.cpp.o CMakeFiles/project4.dir/src/rix/tf/transform_broadcaster.cpp.o CMakeFiles/project4.dir/src/rix/tf/transform_buffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/project4.dir/src/rix/tf/transform_listener.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libproject4.a
